title: Over 17,000 factories registered in nine years of Yogi rule, shows data
description: “Over the past nine years, the Yogi Government has established a new identity for Uttar Pradesh in the field of industrial development. As a result of good governance, transparent policies, and visionary leadership under Yogi Government, 17,841 new factories have been registered in the State from April 2017 until now,” reads an official statement.
